description: Windows-only fs scope extras. On Windows users frequently relocate the Downloads folder to a non-C: drive (e.g. D:\Users\<user>\Downloads) to save C: space. That path is NOT under $HOME, so the default $HOME/** scope rejects writes there with 'forbidden path'. This capability adds $DOWNLOAD/** for the scopes the diagnostic-bundle export touches. Gated to Windows only — on macOS, declaring $DOWNLOAD in scope causes tauri-plugin-fs to resolve the path at init, which triggers a TCC prompt the instant the app launches (see src/__tests__/tauriCapabilities.test.ts header for the historical incident).
